item.title: Missing Pages, 2014-10-11
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Missing Pages. A "Missing Page" in the Christian knowledge and practice of many good hearted believers who do not know of the Orthodox Church is our every day reality that the Saints intercede for us. Everyone understands that angels do God's bidding on the earth, and intervene in the affairs of men, but many do not understand that since God is the God of the living, and not the dead, the Saints are alive and also pray to God for us and intercede on our behalf. The feast day of the Protection of the Mother of God clearly illustrates this every day reality that we live with and which comforts us. We explain this feast which occurs on Oct 1 according to the church calendar (Oct 14 on the Gregorian calendar), and the only thing extraordinary about it was that two holy people saw Mary, the mother of Jesus interceding in heaven for us, along with St John the Baptist and St John the Evangelist, not that it occurred, because the intercession of the saints occurs every day. We are a church of miracles, which are usually seen only by those who think and live spiritually.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Missing Pages. A "Missing Page" in the Christian knowledge and practice of many good hearted believers who do not know of the Orthodox Church is our every day reality that the Saints intercede for us. Everyone understands that angels do God's bidding on the earth, and intervene in the affairs of men, but many do not understand that since God is the God of the living, and not the dead, the Saints are alive and also pray to God for us and intercede on our behalf. The feast day of the Protection of the Mother of God clearly illustrates this every day reality that we live with and which comforts us. We explain this feast which occurs on Oct 1 according to the church calendar (Oct 14 on the Gregorian calendar), and the only thing extraordinary about it was that two holy people saw Mary, the mother of Jesus interceding in heaven for us, along with St John the Baptist and St John the Evangelist, not that it occurred, because the intercession of the saints occurs every day. We are a church of miracles, which are usually seen only by those who think and live spiritually.

item.title: Orthopraxis, 2013-12-15
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A little talk about venerating icons. Why do we paint icons? There is an important theological reason. Why do we venerate them? Is this important? There are important theological and understandable "human" reasons. Read this especially if seeing people venerate icons freaks you out!
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A little talk about venerating icons. Why do we paint icons? There is an important theological reason. Why do we venerate them? Is this important? There are important theological and understandable "human" reasons. Read this especially if seeing people venerate icons freaks you out!

item.title: Orthopraxis, 2013-12-15
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A little talk about venerating icons. Why do we pain icons? There is an important theological reason. Why do we venerate them? Is this important? There are important theological and understandable "human" reasons. Read this especially if seeing people venerate icons freaks you out!
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A little talk about venerating icons. Why do we pain icons? There is an important theological reason. Why do we venerate them? Is this important? There are important theological and understandable "human" reasons. Read this especially if seeing people venerate icons freaks you out!

item.title: Orthopraxis, Incence, 2013
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Why do we use incense? What might be the reaction to incense of a person first visiting the church? What does incense signify? What dogmas does it proclaim?
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Why do we use incense? What might be the reaction to incense of a person first visiting the church? What does incense signify? What dogmas does it proclaim?

item.title: Orthopraxis, Parish Meeting Address, The Purpose Of A Parish, 2012
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Pastor's address at annual meeting, 2012. This is part homily, part sharing from the heart, part progress report, and part exhortation and thanksgiving. The most important part is at the beginning - the "Purpose of a parish"
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Pastor's address at annual meeting, 2012. This is part homily, part sharing form the heart, part progress report, and part exhortation and thanksgiving. The most important part is at the beginning - the "Purpose of a parish"

item.title: Orthopraxis, How To Prepare For Confession, 2011
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on how to prepare for confession. Some of it is not what you might expect, but several practical items are mentioned.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on how to prepare for confession. Some of it is not what you might expect, but several practical items are mentioned.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Sanctity Of Life Sunday, Christians Must Not Accept Abortion And Sexual Immorality Being Redefined, 2011
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Sanctity Of Life Sunday, Christians Must Not Accept Abortion And Sexual Immorality Being Redefined, 2011
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Sanctity Of Life Sunday, Christians Must Not Accept Abortion And Sexual Immorality Being Redefined, 2011

item.title: Prayers Of The Church, Theophany, Prefestal And Festal Troparion And Kontakion, 2008
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Prayers Of The Church. Theophany, Prefestal And Festal Troparion And Kontakion, 2008
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Prayers Of The Church. Theophany, Prefestal And Festal Troparion And Kontakion, 2008

item.title: Lives Of Saints, Holy Prophet and King David, Joseph the Betrothed, James The Just, the Brother of the Lord, Commemorated on the Sunday after Theophany. , 2011
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Lives Of Saints. A homily describing on the Eve of the Sunday after Nativity during matins, describing the Holy Prophet and King David, Joseph the Betrothed, James The Just, the Brother of the Lord. Why are these saints commemorated near to Nativity? What do they teach us about the Nativity?
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Lives Of Saints. A homily describing on the Eve of the Sunday after Nativity during matins, describing the Holy Prophet and King David, Joseph the Betrothed, James The Just, the Brother of the Lord. Why are these saints commemorated near to Nativity? What do they teach us about the Nativity?

item.title: Orthopraxis, Nativity Fast, Fasting Typikon,why Fast, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on the Nativity Fast, on the day the fast began. The Nativity Fast and Great Lent Compared, Nativity Fasting Typikon, Fasting until the Ninth Hour, Why Fast? How does the fast apply to you? (Office parties,Family,The Belly,Prayer,Almsgiving,If you do not fast well). The outline was used in the talk.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on the Nativity Fast, on the day the fast began. The Nativity Fast and Great Lent Compared, Nativity Fasting Typikon, Fasting until the Ninth Hour, Why Fast? How does the fast apply to you? (Office parties,Family,The Belly,Prayer,Almsgiving,If you do not fast well). The outline was used in the talk.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Fall Stewardship Campaign Part 4, Make Your Vows And Pay Them To The Lord Our God, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Psalm 75:10, "Make your vows and pay them to the Lord our God", was the prokeimenon for today. Reader David Hawthorne shares how this verse is very timely for our community, and reads a portion of a commentary from Blessed Augustine and briefly expounds upon it. The point is: we must make some vow to the Lord, even if it is a "widow's mite", to gain spiritual discipline in our lives.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Psalm 75:10, "Make your vows and pay them to the Lord our God", was the prokeimenon for today. Reader David Hawthorne shares how this verse is very timely for our community, and reads a portion of a commentary from Blessed Augustine and briefly expounds upon it. The point is: we must make some vow to the Lord, even if it is a "widow's mite", to gain spiritual discipline in our lives.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Fall Stewardship Campaign Part 3, Giving Our Fruits Must Happen To Increase Our Faith, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. What I want as your pastor is that everyone gives to the church. The amount is not a critical thing to me. What is critical to me, as your pastor, is that you give of your fruits to God and it will increase your faith. I know this to be true in my own lie and the lives of many I have counseled...
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. What I want as your pastor is that everyone gives to the church. The amount is not a critical thing to me. What is critical to me, as your pastor, is that you give of your fruits to God and it will increase your faith. I know this to be true in my own lie and the lives of many I have counseled...

item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthodox Worship. Icons Theology,symbolism, Holy Fathers Of The Seventh Ecumenical Council, 2010
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthodox Worship. Icons Theology,symbolism, Holy Fathers Of The Seventh Ecumenical Council, 2010

item.title: Orthopraxis, Fall Stewardship Campaign Part 1, Stewardship And Loving Our Neighbor, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Fall Stewardship Campaign Part 1, Stewardship And Loving Our Neighbor, 2010
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Fall Stewardship Campaign Part 1, Stewardship And Loving Our Neighbor, 2010

item.title: Orthodox Worship, Temple Design, A tour of our temple and explanation of the symbolism and meaning of various parts of it. , 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthodox Worship. A talk during our first "Visitor Sunday" by Reader David Hawthorne, giving a tour of the temple and explaining the symbolism of various parts of it, with many scriptural citations. The pdf document accompaning this talk is chock full of information about an Orthodox temple, and supplements the talk.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthodox Worship. A talk during our first "Visitor Sunday" by Reader David Hawthorne, giving a tour of the temple and explaining the symbolism of various parts of it, with many scriptural citations. The pdf document accompaning this talk is chock full of information about an Orthodox temple, and supplements the talk.

item.title: Orthopraxis, To Pray For Someone More Diligently, Prayer Of St Silouan Of Mount Athos For All People, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Two prayers that everyone should have for their personal prayer rule. The prayer of St Silouan is especially important. St Silouan prayed for all the people of the world. This is a sure sign of love. We must cultivate habits that build this kind of love. The audio explains a little about these prayers and quotes them.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Two prayers that everyone should have for their personal prayer rule. The prayer of St Silouan is especially important. St Silouan prayed for all the people of the world. This is a sure sign of love. We must cultivate habits that build this kind of love. The audio explains a little about these prayers and quotes them. The word document contains these two prayers. It can be printed and cut into quarters to have 4 sheets with both prayers.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Three Questions About The Cross regarding the sign of the cross,prostrations on sunday and ,venerating the cross or any icon in church, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Three Questions About The Cross regarding the sign of the cross,prostrations on sunday and ,venerating the cross or any icon in church, 2010
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Three Questions About The Cross regarding the sign of the cross,prostrations on sunday and ,venerating the cross or any icon in church, 2010

item.title: Orthopraxis, Offering Prosphora, Proskimidia,service Of Preparation, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on prosphora, which follows the text outline pretty closely. WWhat is prosphora? Styles of Prosphora. How and when is prosphora used? Important pastoral notes, explaining the meaning of commemoration at proskimidie and how to offer prosphora the best way, and local notes about offering prosphora at St Nicholas.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. A short talk on prosphora, which follows the text outline pretty closely. What is prosphora? Styles of Prosphora. How and when is prosphora used? Important pastoral notes, explaingin the meaing of commemoration at proskimidie and how to offer prosphora the best way, and local notes about offering prosphora at St Nicholas.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Baptism And Emergency Baptism, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. a Short talk about the minimum requirements for baptism, and emergency baptism, which is a baptism performed withot a priest when a person is in danger of immanent death. Who can perform this baptism, how should it be done, and what must be done after the baptism is performed. The text is an outline of the talk.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. a Short talk about the minimum requirements for baptism, and emergency baptism, which is a baptism performed withot a priest when a person is in danger of immanent death. Who can perform this baptism, how should it be done, and what must be done after the baptism is performed. The text is an outline of the talk.

item.title: Feasts Of The Theotokos, Dormition, After Liturgy Short Talk, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Feasts Of The Theotokos. A short talk about the Dormition of the Theotokos.Dormition means falling asleep. The Story.. A balanced view. The intercession of the Theotokos. Heresies about the Theotokos:The heresy of the Theotokos as "co-mediatrix",The heresies of The "Immaculate Conception" and "Original Sin" are discussed at length. VERY IMPORTANT! The ever-virginity of the Theotokos explained.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Feasts Of The Theotokos. A short talk about the Dormition of the Theotokos.Dormition means falling asleep. The Story.. A balanced view. The intercession of the Theotokos. Heresies about the Theotokos:The heresy of the Theotokos as "co-mediatrix",The heresies of The "Immaculate Conception" and "Original Sin" are discussed at length. VERY IMPORTANT! The ever-virginity of the Theotokos explained.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Oil, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Oil is used in many ways in the church. This short talk describes chrism, the "oil of gladness", and other uses for oil.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. Oil is used in many ways in the church. This short talk describes chrism, the "oil of gladness", and other uses for oil.

item.title: Orthopraxis, Entering The Church, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. What should we do when we enter the church for the first time that day? Discussion of bows (poklons), prostrations, and venerating icons in church.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. What should we do when we enter the church for the first time that day? Discussion of bows (poklons), prostrations, and venerating icons in church.

item.title: Orthopraxis, The Four Bows, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. The "Four Bows" - a simple set of prayers that should begin the day for everyone. Excellent for children. Also described in the article https://www.orthodox.net//articles/fourbows.html:The Four bows
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Orthopraxis. The "Four Bows" - a simple set of prayers that should begin the day for everyone. Excellent for children. Also described in the article https://www.orthodox.net//articles/fourbows.html:The Four bows

item.title: Feasts Of The Lord, Transfiguration, After Liturgy Short Talk, 2010
item.description: AUDIO catechetical talk:Feasts Of The Lord. A short "after liturgy" talk about the Transfiguraton. The points covered are in the Text handout.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: AUDIO catechetical talk:Feasts Of The Lord. A short "after liturgy" talk about the Transfiguraton. The points covered are in the Text handout.
